feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >drive M4 Comp for the first time >shivers down my spine >tears in my eyes I … I…
entry.content: >drive M4 Comp for the first time >shivers down my spine >tears in my eyes I … I get it now. I’ll sell my 911 Carrera S and buy an actual emotional car instead. I kneel.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: "He come to me with money in his hand! He offered me, I didn't ask him, I wasn't…
entry.content: "He come to me with money in his hand! He offered me, I didn't ask him, I wasn't knocking someone's door down, I was running from that! When I got out, I was in that... I had the studio, I went to Vox Studios. I had it all, and I looked at it and said, 'This is a bigger jail than I just got out of.' I don't want to take my time going to work, I got a motorcycle and a sleeping bag and ten or fifteen girls! What the hell I wanna go off into – and go to work for? Work for what, money? I got all the

entry.title: /int/ International: When ameritards and brown peepo say british food is gross they mean things like …
entry.content: When ameritards and brown peepo say british food is gross they mean things like blood sausage, chicken livers and meat/offal pies with are all some of the most delicious food you could taste and much much better than their hecking wholesomerino carbs+hot sauce slop.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Any recommendations (old and recent releases) for gameplay first games? I think …
entry.content: Any recommendations (old and recent releases) for gameplay first games? I think the correct statement is "gameplay loop" instead of gameplay an open world game is prioritizing gameplay over story but you are just completing a list of chores and repeating side quests over and over just to pad playtime which gets old quickly

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >no rap, no house, no techno >only the occasional italo-disco and post-punk or t…
entry.content: >no rap, no house, no techno >only the occasional italo-disco and post-punk or tangerine dream >life is good I finally get it now: how incredibly reactionary and based synthwave is. It's not just nostalgia, it's a statement and it wants us to start again from there.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /AltTWif/ - Alternate timeline what if thread
entry.content: We post alt history timeline ITT and discuss how the world would change by it. One important rule is you have to explain how such a scenario is possible and just say shit like "WhaT iF the AmIGa BEaT ThE PC As tHE DoMAnAnt pLaTFoRm!" I'll start, what if starting in 1997 DEC bought out SGI, Novell, SCO and the rights for Research UNIX from Lucent Technology, joined Project Monterey through the SCO purchase, sold the rights to MIPS, which they acquired from the SGI sale, to Intel instead of sellin

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Some must-have AdGuard/uBlock/Brave filters that are not in common community lis…
entry.content: Some must-have AdGuard/uBlock/Brave filters that are not in common community lists or wikis. boards.4chan.org##.danbo-slot,.adl, .adl+hr,.desktop>hr,#delform>hr boards.4chan.org,sys.4chan.org##:ro ot:style(color-scheme: dark !important;) boards.4chan.org###threadWatcher:st yle(border: 1px solid #111111 !important;) boards.4chan.org##.deadlink:style(t ext-decoration: line-through !important; color: #5f89ac !important;) myanimelist.net##mal-tooltip www.reddit.com###left-sidebar-conta iner,#right-s

entry.title: /g/ Technology: AI isn't taking your jobs, it's just sucking up all funding that would normally …
entry.content: AI isn't taking your jobs, it's just sucking up all funding that would normally go to web startups. You people should have realized your work was a joke when they started adding cute mascots to languages and utilities. Oh right, the chinese are better at web now, look at temu and tiktok. America conceded that they lost when they forced bytedance to give up control of tiktok. AI isn't going to help either, unless they somehow manage to render AI into the real world (not telling humans what to do

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >the key to being a good writer is saying what you need to say in the least amou…
entry.content: >the key to being a good writer is saying what you need to say in the least amount of words possible >the key to being a good director is showing not telling with minimal edits or visual noise >the key to being a good music writer is.... to write long songs that overstay their welcome with pointless key changes and long solos or instrumentals Why the difference in music writing?

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I'm convinced that AI has already plateaued in terms of what it can actually imp…
entry.content: I'm convinced that AI has already plateaued in terms of what it can actually improve about day-to-day life for people over 90 IQ. Very fast rough estimates of statistical models for when time is of the essence (military application), dumping out unimportant busywork slop like form letters and corporate emails, and basically functioning like a better synthesis of a search engine and Wikipedia (not a proper encyclopedia, just Wikipedia). Everything else they try to get "spicy autocomplete" to do i

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >have to go live in the US to work for five years by next year >research cars th…
entry.content: >have to go live in the US to work for five years by next year >research cars that can hold best value so I can sell before traveling back >my best options are a Toyota Camry HEV or RAV4 PHEV anything else is a big loss, there’s literally no good sedan or sport coupe like my current car other than junk that drops 80% of its value. … am I committing a sin by buying a hybrid?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Wheel color
entry.content: I'm getting my wheels refurbished - what color should I go for? OZ Superleggera if anyone is interested.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Flying cars
entry.content: When the fuck are we getting flying cars? This would be amazing that we can all take to the skies and live like it's the future.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Anyone else worried about Europe/US ruining cars for everyone? Taking a look at …
entry.content: Anyone else worried about Europe/US ruining cars for everyone? Taking a look at the "Mothers Against Drunk Driving" situation where they want alcohol meters and a perpetual camera monitor in the car in the US (some already installed in the newer Cadillac models already) or the Euro's version of it with GRS2 which requires alcohol metering, awareness monitoring and a max speed limit set by the ECU to be under 100km/h It feels like it'll be impossible to buy an affordable, honest car in the future

entry.title: /news/ News: German tourist goes viral sampling Chili’s, Buc-ee’s and other US chains on World Cup road trip
entry.content: https://www.aol.com/news/german-tou rist-goes-viral-sampling-131618850. html A German soccer fan has accidentally become America's newest tourism ambassador — one Taco Bell run, a Buc-ee's pilgrimage and a Chili's dinner at a time. Freddy, who posts on X as @FreddyLA7, has exploded in popularity after documenting his six-week World Cup road trip across the Southern United States with the kind of wide-eyed enthusiasm usually reserved for Disney World. In just the past day alone, he's picked up th

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Gears Of War: E-Day Reportedly Has A Staggering $400 Million Budget
entry.content: >To break even, the game might need to sell around 5.7 million copies Why is it so expensive? The graphics aren’t much better than the G5’s, yet the cost is astronomical. I doubt it’ll ever break even. GEARS OF WAR is long outdated. Plus, there’s a transgender woman in it. Players will only buy a month of XGP to play it. I’ll just download pirated copies; I’m not going to pay to see an ugly woman. https://wolfsgamingblog.com/2026/06 /13/gears-of-war-e-day-reportedly-h as-a-staggering-400-million

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is re-Linuxing ChromeOS (or, rather ChromiumOS) possible? I'm not asking if it's…
entry.content: Is re-Linuxing ChromeOS (or, rather ChromiumOS) possible? I'm not asking if it's practical or even reasonable, just whether such an idea is even theoretically possible at all. Because, if it's based on Gentoo Linux, could someone who was willing to get their hands dirty for a proof of concept project theoretically re-import stuff like a package manager and other stuff Google removed back into it by hacking away at it? Or is that impossible? I know next to nothing about this I just thought the id

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Arch lost any purpose
entry.content: Arch should be considered a niche distro now, all of its possible uses are better done and offered by other distros with way better support. Arch Linux is an independently developed, x86-64 general-purpose GNU/Linux distribution that strives to provide the latest stable versions of most software by following a rolling release model. The project is composed of 30 dudes with automated scripts that can't put DNS protection nor a proper signing package server and ended up accepting one from Valve it

entry.title: /mu/ Music: What happened to Trance?
entry.content: People talk about Hard Rock as this "unc" genre but I feel like I've rarely seen as many GenX and even Boomers at a non-classical concert than at Trance ones. What made tastes shift so hard towards DnB and Tech House?

entry.title: /vip/ VIP: The first time i ever played Golden Eye 007 on Nintendo was at a school kids hou…
entry.content: The first time i ever played Golden Eye 007 on Nintendo was at a school kids house. His mum had one rule, don't use the golden gun. "Okay" i said, having no idea what she was talking about. We were playing VS split-screen everything was normal and weapons were scattered throughout the map. I shot my friend and he died in one bullet, he started crying and his mum sent me home. Turns out I'd accidentally picked up the Golden Gun o_o
